'''fahobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:grade|grade]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-h-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:grade|grade]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fahobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæhebeth|fæhebeth]] || [[word:fæhebej|fæhebej]] || [[word:fæhebesh|fæhebesh]] || [[word:fæhebe|fæhebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fahohoboth|fahohoboth]] || [[word:fahohoboj|fahohoboj]] || [[word:fahohobosh|fahohobosh]] || [[word:fahohobo|fahohobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fahoboth|fahoboth]] || [[word:fahoboj|fahoboj]] || [[word:fahobosh|fahobosh]] || [[word:fahobo|fahobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fahofboth|fahofboth]] || [[word:fahofboj|fahofboj]] || [[word:fahofbosh|fahofbosh]] || [[word:fahofbof|fahofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fahobotho|fahobotho]] || [[word:fahobojo|fahobojo]] || [[word:fahobosho|fahobosho]] || [[word:fahoboko|fahoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fahoboth|fahoboth]] || [[word:fahoboj|fahoboj]] || [[word:fahobosh|fahobosh]] || [[word:fahobo|fahobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fahobothol|fahobothol]] || [[word:fahobojol|fahobojol]] || [[word:fahoboshol|fahoboshol]] || [[word:fahobokol|fahobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fahobothotho|fahobothotho]] || [[word:fahobojojo|fahobojojo]] || [[word:fahoboshosho|fahoboshosho]] || [[word:fahoboko|fahoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fahobothon|fahobothon]] || [[word:fahobojon|fahobojon]] || [[word:fahoboshon|fahoboshon]] || [[word:fahobokon|fahobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fahobothoro|fahobothoro]] || [[word:fahobojoro|fahobojoro]] || [[word:fahoboshoro|fahoboshoro]] || [[word:fahobokoro|fahobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
